notes: Local model: Ollama integration routes simple chat to Qwen 3.5 4B locally (saves API costs)
Image understanding: photos sent via WhatsApp are now seen and described by Claude
Weather: live conditions in dashboard header (OpenWeatherMap)
Morning briefing: daily WhatsApp summary at 07:00 -- weather, calendar, todos, Henry weekends
Structured logging: Pino replaces all console.log across the codebase
Audit log: every tool execution logged with sender, input, success/failure
Circuit breakers: Google, Claude, and weather APIs protected against cascading failures
Buffer persistence: owner conversation context survives service restarts
Graceful shutdown: flushes usage, todos, audit, buffers on SIGTERM/SIGINT
Daily backup: todos, soul, soul_history backed up at 3 AM (7-day retention)
Dashboard: usage alerts (amber/red), 3-state status dot, weather display
